title: My Little Plushie
description: Adds plushies based on "My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic".
body:
![A room with a red double-bed at the center is surrounded by plushies, from left to right: Rainbow Dash, Rarity, Twilight Sparkle, Pinkie Pie, Applejack, and Fluttershy. Above is a large, pink "MY LITTLE PLUSHIE" logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kOALBxSi/images/41d812feb8fe334940d92707e99e18ecd8c2f93e.png)

# ✨ The Gift of Friendship ✨

The **My Little Plushie** mod adds a multitude of candy-colored pony plushies based on the "My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic" series.

# 🎊 Currently Available Plushies

<details>
<summary>Main Plushies</summary>

- Twilight Sparkle
- Rainbow Dash
- Pinkie Pie
- Rarity
- Applejack
- Fluttershy
- Princess Celestia
- Princess Luna
- Nightmare Moon
- Starlight Glimmer
- Trixie Lulamoon
- The Great and Powerful Trixie
- Apple Bloom
- Sweetie Belle
- Scootaloo
- Apple Bloom (Bunny)
- Princess Cadance
- Shining Armor
- Princess Flurry Heart
- Queen Chrysalis

</details>

<details>
<summary>Supporting Plushies</summary>

- Big McIntosh
- Granny Smith
- Cheerilee
- Mayor Mare
- Zecora
- Mr. Carrot Cake
- Mrs. Cup Cake
- Moon Dancer
- Moon Dancer (Sweater)
- Minuette
- Lemon Hearts
- Twinkleshine
- Twilight Velvet
- Pear Butter
- Cloudy Quartz
- Cookie Crumbles
- Cookie Crumbles (Classic)
- Windy Whistles
- Mrs. Shy
- Mane Allgood
- Spoiled Rich
- Stellar Flare

<details>

![A huge collection of the available plushies in the mod organized in rows.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kOALBxSi/images/a487ea88bd4ab826a68b54221397184394a34b13.png)

(The image above _might_ be outdated!)

(Please see the lists above for a complete list of available plushies. You can also check out the gallery)

# 💖 Plushie Features

### Decoration & Properties

The main purpose of **Plushies** are for **decorating and collecting**. However, they also have **_special_** properties when placed in your world.

<details>
<summary>In-World Properties</summary>

- **Earth Ponies** help bees pollinate
- **Pegasi** prevent fall damage
- **Unicorns** and **Alicorns** can boost enchanting tables like bookshelves

</details>

### Hugs & Effects
  
**Hugging** your plushie will give **_special effects_**. This can be helpful while you are exploring your world or on an adventure!

<details>
<summary>Hug Effects (Configurable)</summary>

All Plushies give a "Friendship" effect which is similar to Regeneration

- **Earth Ponies**: Strength
- **Pegasi**: Slow Falling
- **Unicorns**: Absorption
- **Alicorns**: Strength, Slow Falling, Absorption, Glowing
- **Zebras**: Regeneration, Health Boost; Removes Poison, Weakness, Slowness
- **Changelings**: Invisibility, Slow Falling

</details>

### Repairing Plushies
  
Combining two of the same plushies will repair it like any other tool. **Anvils** allows the use of **_any kind of wool._**

![An anvil repair recipe with a damaged Rarity Plushie as the first item. The repair ingredient cycles between a damaged Rarity Plushie and Lime Green Wool.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a7aa72232073240cdf7217b1cbc67f704644f3f.gif)

# 🎁 Gift Boxes & Getting Plushies
Obtain and open **Gift Boxes** to get plushies. Opening a gift box will give a **_random_** plushie.

All plushies have an **_equal_** chance to drop from a Gift Box.

### Exploration

By exploring structures you can find Gift Boxes in loot chests. Gift Boxes generate in dungeons, strongholds, end cities, ancient cities, pillager outposts, and woodland mansions.

### Crafting & Plushie Recycling
  
You can **craft** your own Gift Box instead of finding them in structures. You can also **recycle** **_four extra plushies of any kind_** into a Gift Box.

![On the left is the Gift Box crafting recipe which showcases a 3x3 crafting grid with a dropper in the center surrounded by eight amethyst shards. On the right is a shapeless crafting recipe where four plushies of any kind are crafted together to be recycled into a new Gift Box.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22ec66d5b84814ae290e36f873c95e6b28955211.png)

# 🔧 Configuration
Configure the mod by editing the `config/mylittleplushie-config.properties` file.

- Enable/Disable hug effects
- Adjust hug effect duration and power
- Adjust plushie durability

If the config changes in future versions, you may need to **delete** the config to allow the mod to **generate** a new config file the **_next time you start the game_**.

You can also do this to reset the config if necessary.

# 🎆 Other Notes
**Thank You** for checking out my mod!

Shoutout to the other Pony Content Mods:

- [Mine Little Pony](https://modrinth.com/mod/mine-little-pony)
- [Unicopia](https://modrinth.com/mod/unicopia)
- [Ponified](https://modrinth.com/mod/ponified)
